subject: ad-toycar-fp32
notes: ToyCar dev-set test files, 4 machine IDs (2459 files total), per-ID AUC averaged (matches 01_test.py's metric). MLPerf Tiny reference ballpark: AUC >= 0.83; published runs vary ~0.80-0.85 depending on training-set composition and seed -- this uses the committed reference checkpoint as-is, no retraining.
